'''Escro group''' was a group of three [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. They attempted to prevent the capture of ''[[Onece 3]]'' after [[Roe group]] was destroyed but were also destroyed by forces of [[Outpost D-34]]. Escro group consisted of [[Escro 1]], [[Escro 2]], and [[Escro 3]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
